ingredients.name: Kawamura Tatami Shop
ingredients.address: イ１１１−１ Yunotsucho Ida, Oda, Shimane 699-2507, Japan

ingredients.name: Pine Wood Auto Camping Ground
ingredients.localName: パインウッド オートキャンプ場
ingredients.address: Daiku, Yamanashi, 405-0045, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: In the movie, the adult Outclub members scout potential sites for their dream campground project, and Pine Wood Auto Camping Ground in Yamanashi appears among the locations they visit as part of that planning journey. It represents the spark of the group's ambition to build something lasting together.

ingredients.name: Shibireko Suimeisou
ingredients.address: 3378 Yamaho, Ichikawamisato, Nishiyatsushiro District, Yamanashi 409-3602, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Lake Shibire and its lakeside inn appear in the movie as the Outclub scours Yamanashi for a suitable campground location, with the tranquil scenery matching the reflective mood of grown-up Nadeshiko and her friends revisiting their camping roots.

ingredients.name: Shima Rin at home
ingredients.description: Shima Rin at home (志摩リン自宅) — local spot in Nakanokura, near Kōshū Iroha Slope and 木喰記念館. Not listed on Google Maps, but the coordinates fall in this area — a verified scene location. Navigate by coordinates / Street View.
ingredients.entityContext: The movie opens with adult Rin living and working in Nagoya, and the area around Nakanokura serves as the exterior of her home, capturing the quiet solo-living lifestyle she carries from her camping days into adulthood.

ingredients.name: Shishinkaku
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒409-2524 Yamanashi, Minamikoma District, Minobu, 4223
ingredients.entityContext: Shishinkaku temple on Mount Minobu appears in the movie during the group's survey of the Yamanashi region, set against sweeping views of the area that reinforce how deeply connected the story is to this mountain landscape.

ingredients.name: Site of Kajikazawa Chubu Elementary School
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒400-0601 Yamanashi, Minamikoma District, Fujikawa, Kajikazawa, 5084
ingredients.entityContext: The overgrown site of the former Kajikazawa Chubu Elementary School is the key location the Outclub selects for their campground project, and the moment Nadeshiko and her friends first walk onto the abandoned grounds is a pivotal turning point in the film.

ingredients.name: South Observation Deck
ingredients.address: Tochomae Station, 45階, 2 Chome-8-1 Nishishinjuku, Shinjuku City, Tokyo 160-8001, Japan

ingredients.name: Suimeiso Camping Ground
ingredients.localName: 四尾連湖 水明荘キャンプ場
ingredients.address: 3378 Yamaho, Ichikawamisato, Nishiyatsushiro District, Yamanashi 409-3602, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Suimeiso Camping Ground on the shore of Lake Shibire is one of the sites the Outclub inspects while planning their new campground, and its peaceful lakeside setting echoes the gentle, laid-back atmosphere the group hopes to recreate for future campers.

ingredients.name: Takaori Diamond Fuji Spot
ingredients.localName: 高下ダイヤモンド富士スポット
ingredients.address: 2496 Takaori, Fujikawa, Minamikoma District, Yamanashi 400-0513, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Takaori Diamond Fuji viewpoint in Fujikawa is featured in the movie as a stunning natural landmark in the region the Outclub is working to develop, underscoring the extraordinary natural beauty that makes Yamanashi the perfect home for their campground dream.

ingredients.name: Tamao Bridge
ingredients.description: Tamao Bridge (多摩大橋) — local bridge in Tachikawa, Tokyo, near KOMEHYO（コメ兵）買取センター立川南口 and KOMEHYO（コメ兵）買取センター立川髙島屋S.C.. Not listed on Google Maps, but the coordinates fall in this area — a verified scene location. Navigate by coordinates / Street View.
ingredients.entityContext: Tamao Bridge in Tachikawa appears as a background location during the Tokyo portion of the film, seen when characters travel between the city and the Yamanashi countryside in pursuit of their campground project.

ingredients.name: Yamanashi Prefectural Government Annex
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒400-0031 Yamanashi, Kofu, Marunouchi, 1 Chome−6−1 山梨県庁別館
ingredients.entityContext: The Yamanashi Prefectural Government Annex features in the movie when Nadeshiko and the Outclub navigate the bureaucratic process of obtaining permits for their campground, adding a grounded, adult dimension to their passion project.

ingredients.name: Yatsugatake Honzawa Hot Spring
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒384-1301 Nagano, Minamisaku District, Minamimaki, Umijiri, 国定公園内
ingredients.entityContext: Yatsugatake Honzawa Hot Spring, Japan's highest outdoor hot spring, appears in the movie during Rin's solo trip into the Yatsugatake mountains, delivering the kind of solitary, scenic hot spring moment that defines her character.

ingredients.name: Yatsugatake parking area (Down)
ingredients.localName: 八ヶ岳 パーキングエリア (下り)
ingredients.type: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
categories: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
ingredients.address: 6811-155 Nagasakacho Obatta, Hokuto, Yamanashi 408-0034, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Yatsugatake Parking Area (Down) on the Chuo Expressway is shown as a rest stop during road trips between Nagoya and Yamanashi, capturing the unglamorous but cozy highway pit-stop atmosphere the series always celebrates.

ingredients.name: Yumemiru Kawaguchiko Cottage Tozawa Center
ingredients.localName: 夢見る河口湖 コテージ戸沢センター
ingredients.type: コテージレンタル業者
categories: コテージレンタル業者
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒401-0305 Yamanashi, Minamitsuru District, Fujikawaguchiko, Oishi, 2578
ingredients.entityContext: This cottage facility near Lake Kawaguchi appears in the movie as one of the reference campgrounds the Outclub visits while researching models for their own project, reflecting how seriously the group approaches their shared goal.

ingredients.name: Koan Camping Ground
ingredients.address: 2926 Nakanokura, Minobu, Minamikoma District, Yamanashi 409-3104, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Koan Camping Ground on the shore of Lake Motosu is one of the most iconic locations in all of Yuru Camp, and in the movie the adult Nadeshiko returns there, stirring memories of her very first solo camping experience and the friendship with Rin that began here.

ingredients.name: JUNKUDO Nagoya
ingredients.localName: ジュンク堂書店 名古屋店
ingredients.address: 堀内ビル 1F, 3 Chome-25-9 Meieki, Nakamura Ward, Nagoya, Aichi 450-0002, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: JUNKUDO bookstore in Nagoya appears in the movie during scenes set in the city where adult Rin works, showing her browsing outdoor and camping-related books during her off hours, a small detail that keeps her character rooted in her passion.

ingredients.name: EXPASA Dangozaka (outbound)
ingredients.type: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
categories: サービスエリア / パーキング エリア
ingredients.address: 大野窪 ７１０, Notajiri, Uenohara, Yamanashi 409-0125, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: EXPASA Dangozaka service area on the Chuo Expressway appears during the group's drives between Tokyo and Yamanashi, serving as a fun stop where the characters eat and joke around before getting back on the road for their campground mission.

ingredients.name: Daikokuya
ingredients.type: リサイクル ショップ
categories: リサイクル ショップ
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-6-1 Shinsaibashisuji, Chuo Ward, Osaka, 542-0085, Japan

ingredients.name: Coffee House Kako
ingredients.localName: コーヒーハウス かこ 花車本店
ingredients.address: 5 Chome-16-17 Meieki, Nakamura Ward, Nagoya, Aichi 450-0002, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Coffee House Kako, a long-standing Nagoya coffee shop, appears in the movie as part of the Nagoya setting where adult Rin lives, capturing the cozy everyday atmosphere of her life away from the mountains.

ingredients.name: Kuonji Station (Mt. Minobu Ropeway)
ingredients.localName: 久遠寺駅(身延山ロープウェイ)
ingredients.address: 字上の山-4226-2 Minobu, Minamikoma District, Yamanashi 409-2524, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Kuonji Station at the base of the Mt. Minobu ropeway appears in the movie as the group travels up the mountain area, connecting the spiritual landmark of Minobu with the natural scenery central to the film's setting.

ingredients.address: 2126 Hirasu, Minobu, Minamikoma District, Yamanashi 409-3313, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Minobu Shizen no Sato's mountain campsite is one of the Yamanashi camping grounds the Outclub scouts during their research phase, its forest setting giving the team a direct sense of the terrain they are trying to develop.

ingredients.address: 2-chome-6-1 Daikanyama, Akishima, Tokyo 196-8533, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Mori Park Outdoor Village in Akishima, a well-known outdoor gear shopping complex, appears in the movie when Nadeshiko and colleagues visit to research camping equipment for their project, a nod to the series' deep appreciation of real-world outdoor retail culture.

ingredients.name: Motosuko Observation Park
ingredients.address: 2926 Nakanokura, Minobu, Minamikoma District, Yamanashi 409-3104, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Motosuko Observation Park near Lake Motosu offers one of the iconic views of Mount Fuji reflected over the lake, and in the movie this viewpoint appears as a meaningful spot tied to the Outclub's history and the campground area they are developing nearby.

ingredients.name: Nagoya Station
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-1-4 Meieki, Nakamura Ward, Nagoya, Aichi, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Nagoya Station is a recurring landmark in the movie because adult Rin lives and works in the city, and the station appears as her point of departure on her journeys back to Yamanashi to reunite with her old campfire friends.

ingredients.name: Nana chan Doll
ingredients.address: 1 Chome-2-5, Nakamura Ward, Nagoya, Aichi 450-0002, Japan

ingredients.name: Nanbu Bridge
ingredients.description: Nanbu Bridge (南部橋) — local bridge in Minamikoma, Yamanashi, near Utsubuna Park and 南部氏館跡. Not listed on Google Maps, but the coordinates fall in this area — a verified scene location. Navigate by coordinates / Street View.
ingredients.entityContext: Nanbu Bridge over the Fujikawa River in Minamikoma appears in the movie during the Outclub's surveys of the southern Yamanashi countryside, with the bridge and river scenery adding to the rural landscape surrounding their campground project.

ingredients.name: Nap's Hamamatsu
ingredients.address: 525 Barajimacho, Chuo Ward, Hamamatsu, Shizuoka 435-0047, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Nap's motorcycle shop in Hamamatsu appears in the movie when Rin stops in for supplies or maintenance during a road trip, a detail that lovingly acknowledges the motorcycle culture central to her character throughout the Yuru Camp series.

ingredients.entityContext: The road near Tire Garden Nambu in Yamanashi is shown as a passing location during the Outclub's drives through the Nambu area while scouting the southern Yamanashi region for their campground site.

ingredients.name: Nichiren Shonin Oteue Sugi
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒409-2524 Yamanashi, Minamikoma District, Minobu
ingredients.entityContext: This ancient cedar planted by the Buddhist saint Nichiren at Minobu appears in the movie during scenes set around the Kuonji temple complex, providing an atmospheric backdrop for the group's exploration of the mountain town tied to the film's setting.

ingredients.name: Ogino Fujikawa Store
ingredients.address: 973-1 Aoyagimachi, Fujikawa, Minamikoma District, Yamanashi 400-0501, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Ogino supermarket in Fujikawa appears in the movie as a practical stop where the Outclub picks up food supplies during their time working in the Yamanashi area, grounding the film in the everyday rhythms of rural life.
